title: Reusable Editorial Portrait
sourceTitle: Fashion Cover Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable editorial portrait with controlled editorial portrait with distinct wardrobe, setting, mood, camera language, and refined color treatment. High-end fashion editorial, luxury magazine cover. Young American woman with long black hair in soft waves, smooth radiant skin, playful pout looking slightly aside, minimal glam makeup with glossy li. Wearing a red satin off-shoulder crop top with matching high-waist skirt, small gold hoop earrings, delicate necklace with red heart pendant. Mid-length portrait, centered. Adult Subject: adult creative director with relaxed morning expression. Wardrobe: soft white shirt, loose knit cardigan, minimal jewelry, natural hair texture. Setting: cozy pastel bedroom seen from overhead with rumpled linen and small breakfast tray. Portrait Mood: quiet intimate lifestyle portrait, calm and aspirational. Camera Style: top-down editorial photography, natural window light, soft shadows, high detail. Palette: cream, blush pink, pale blue, and warm beige accents. Subject: Make adult creative director with relaxed morning expression the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in cozy pastel bedroom seen from overhead with rumpled linen and small breakfast tray. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use portrait-forward editorial framing with readable face, controlled crop, wardrobe detail, and uncluttered negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in top-down editorial photography, natural window light, soft shadows, high detail. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use cream, blush pink, pale blue, and warm beige accents. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
